A.text: It stays as a smooth, thick disk throughout.

B.text: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then splits into two separate disks that move apart.

C.text: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then breaks apart into thin streams.

D.text: It starts as a thin and rough disk and becomes a thicker, smoother disk.

parsed.answer_value: It starts as a donut, becomes a disk, and then breaks apart into thin streams.
parsed.rationale: The gas initially forms a donut shape, then evolves into a disk. In the late stages, the disk breaks apart into thin streams, as seen in the final frames.
